changes.before: Ahead, the road had dropped all trace of ordinary farm traffic.
changes.after: Ahead, ordinary farm traffic was gone from the road.

changes.before: Once or twice her head turned a fraction, not toward any sound Sylvanas could hear, but toward the pressure under the ground and in the air.
changes.after: Once or twice her head turned a fraction, not toward any sound, but toward the pressure under the ground and in the air.

changes.before: The last rise gave Hearthglen to them whole.
changes.after: From the last rise, Hearthglen came into view whole.

changes.before: The woman let go at once. Answered.
changes.after: The woman let go at once.

changes.before: They rode through the gate into heat, noise, and the thick working smell of a town saving itself one body at a time.
changes.after: They rode through the gate into heat, noise, and the thick working smell of priests and soldiers working one body at a time.

changes.before: The closer they came to the southern field tents, the cleaner the motion became. Narrowed by people who had been at it too long to waste anything.
changes.after: The closer they came to the southern field tents, the cleaner the motion became. People who had been at it too long wasted nothing.

changes.before: The first thing he saw was the shape they made: Cyndia left, Jaina center, Sylvanas forward-right.
changes.after: Uther's gaze moved over them in order: Cyndia left, Jaina center, Sylvanas forward-right.

changes.before: Uther knew which question she meant.
changes.after: Uther answered the question behind it.

changes.before: Then the dead remembered how many they were.
changes.after: Then more of the dead started rising at once.

changes.before: Jaina's posture tightened by less than an inch. Sylvanas saw it anyway.
changes.after: Jaina's posture tightened by less than an inch.

changes.before: The officer nearest the flap found his boots fascinating.
changes.after: The officer nearest the flap kept his attention on his boots.

changes.before: Sylvanas watched his gauntlet settle beside Stratholme's walls.
changes.after: His gauntlet settled beside Stratholme's walls.

changes.before: Falric checked Jaina, then Arthas. He had heard men speak to the prince in many tones. That one was not common among them.
changes.after: Falric checked Jaina, then Arthas. He had heard men speak to the prince in many tones. Even Falric took a second look.

changes.before: The first hard edges of a plan.
